about.title: About Me
about.body: Full stack software engineer with experience building web applications and custom systems across diverse contexts. I specialize in spotting real-world needs and turning them into effective, user-focused software. I combine technical excellence with strategic thinking, integrating agile practices, architectural design, and clean, testable code. I work as a freelancer in my spare time and I'm currently building a tech startup.

items.title: Casa del Kumis — Website
items.description: Responsive landing and informational site focused on brand identity, catalog and on-page SEO.

items.title: POS — Casa del Kumis
items.description: Point-of-sale system running in production across 18 branches. Billing integrated with Credinbanco API for card payments via payment terminal.

items.title: Bank Reconciliation Tool
items.description: Financial tool that cross-references payment vouchers against bank statements in detail to verify everything is in order.

items.title: ERP — Food Sales System
items.description: Java MVC ERP system for managing sales, customers, inventory and reports. Actively in development.

bullets: POS system deployed across 18 active branches with Credinbanco API integration for card payments via terminal.
Bank reconciliation tool (punteo) that automatically matches vouchers against bank statements to detect discrepancies.
Maintained company website with SEO optimization, WebP media and mobile-first responsive design.
Built ERP to manage sales, inventory and customers (Java MVC + MySQL).
Desktop UI with Swing; JDBC persistence and Excel export (POI).
Experimental WhatsApp notifications on successful sales.
Custom web solutions for small businesses (landing + e-commerce MVPs).
Component systems and design tokens to scale UI consistency.

contact.title: Let's build something
contact.subtitle: Do you have an idea, a product to launch or a system to improve? I can help you turn it into reliable, scalable software.
